description: One row per month. Monthly values = last - first of cumulative registers.

targets.query:
import "math"
import "timezone"

// === Cumulative metrics: delta = last_of_month - first_of_month ===
// One aggregateWindow pass per function, then a single join.

cum_raw =
  from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
    |> filter(fn: (r) =>
        r.name == "pv_cumulative" or
        r.name == "pv3_cumulative" or
        r.name == "load_cumulative" or
        r.name == "batt_charge_cumulative" or
        r.name == "batt_discharge_cumulative"
    )
    |> group(columns: ["name"])

mo_last =
  cum_raw
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: last,  createEmpty: false)
    |> group()
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")

mo_first =
  cum_raw
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: first, createEmpty: false)
    |> group()
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")

deltas =
  join(tables: {last: mo_last, first: mo_first}, on: ["_time"])
    |> map(fn: (r) => {
        pv   = ((if exists r.pv_cumulative_last    then r.pv_cumulative_last    else 0.0) -
                (if exists r.pv_cumulative_first   then r.pv_cumulative_first   else 0.0) +
                (if exists r.pv3_cumulative_last   then r.pv3_cumulative_last   else 0.0) -
                (if exists r.pv3_cumulative_first  then r.pv3_cumulative_first  else 0.0))
        load = ((if exists r.load_cumulative_last  then r.load_cumulative_last  else 0.0) -
                (if exists r.load_cumulative_first then r.load_cumulative_first else 0.0))
        bc   = ((if exists r.batt_charge_cumulative_last   then r.batt_charge_cumulative_last   else 0.0) -
                (if exists r.batt_charge_cumulative_first  then r.batt_charge_cumulative_first  else 0.0))
        bd   = ((if exists r.batt_discharge_cumulative_last   then r.batt_discharge_cumulative_last   else 0.0) -
                (if exists r.batt_discharge_cumulative_first  then r.batt_discharge_cumulative_first  else 0.0))
        return {_time: r._time,
                "PV (kWh)":             math.round(x: (if pv   >= 0.0 then pv   else 0.0) * 10.0) / 10.0,
                "Load (kWh)":           math.round(x: (if load >= 0.0 then load else 0.0) * 10.0) / 10.0,
                "Batt Charge (kWh)":    math.round(x: (if bc   >= 0.0 then bc   else 0.0) * 10.0) / 10.0,
                "Batt Discharge (kWh)": math.round(x: (if bd   >= 0.0 then bd   else 0.0) * 10.0) / 10.0}
      })

// === Grid import: daily-reset register → max per day → sum per month ===
grid_monthly =
  from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "grid_to_load_daily" or r.name == "grid_to_batt_daily")
    |> group(columns: ["name"])
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, location: timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo"), fn: max, createEmpty: false)
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
    |> group()
    |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        _time: r._time,
        "Grid Import (kWh)":
          math.round(x: ((if exists r.grid_to_load_daily then r.grid_to_load_daily else 0.0) +
                         (if exists r.grid_to_batt_daily then r.grid_to_batt_daily else 0.0)) * 10.0) / 10.0
    }))

// === Join the two results on _time ===
join(tables: {d: deltas, g: grid_monthly}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      load = r["Load (kWh)_d"]
      gi   = r["Grid Import (kWh)_g"]
      ss   = if load > 0.0 then math.round(x: (1.0 - gi / load) * 1000.0) / 10.0 else 0.0
      return {
        _time:                   r._time,
        "PV (kWh)":              r["PV (kWh)_d"],
        "Load (kWh)":            load,
        "Grid Import (kWh)":     gi,
        "Batt Charge (kWh)":     r["Batt Charge (kWh)_d"],
        "Batt Discharge (kWh)":  r["Batt Discharge (kWh)_d"],
        "Self-Sufficiency (%)":  ss
      }
  })
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

panels.title: Monthly Statistics — One Row per Month

targets.query:
import "timezone"

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "pv_powmr_daily")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, location: timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo"), fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value"])

import "timezone"

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "grid_to_load_daily")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, location: timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo"), fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value"])

import "timezone"

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "load_daily")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, location: timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo"), fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time","_value"])

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "batt_charge_cumulative")
  |> group(columns: ["name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> difference()
  |> rename(columns: {"_value": "Batt Charge (kWh)"})
  |> drop(columns: ["name","reg","unit","_measurement","_field"])

title: Solar Monitor — Monthly Statistics
